craft.name: Voyager 1
craft.mission: Grand Tour flybys; now in interstellar space — the farthest human-made object

craft.name: Voyager 2
craft.mission: Only craft to visit Uranus & Neptune; in interstellar space since 2018

craft.name: New Horizons
craft.mission: First Pluto flyby (2015), then Arrokoth (2019); leaving the system

craft.name: Parker Solar Probe
craft.mission: Skims the corona at ~6 M km — the fastest human-made object

craft.name: JWST
craft.mission: Infrared space telescope orbiting Sun–Earth L2

craft.name: Juno
craft.mission: Jupiter polar orbiter — interior, gravity and aurorae

craft.name: Lucy
craft.mission: Touring the Jupiter Trojan asteroids — 8+ flybys through 2033

craft.name: Solar Orbiter
craft.mission: Close-in solar observatory imaging the Sun's poles

craft.name: Europa Clipper
craft.mission: En route to Europa — ocean-habitability survey (arrives 2030)

craft.name: Psyche
craft.mission: En route to the metal asteroid 16 Psyche (arrives 2029)

craft.name: BepiColombo
craft.mission: Twin Mercury orbiters — arriving Nov 2026 after nine flybys

craft.name: Hera
craft.mission: Surveying Didymos–Dimorphos, the asteroid DART deflected (arrives Dec 2026)

craft.name: OSIRIS-APEX
craft.mission: OSIRIS-REx extended — chasing Apophis to its 2029 Earth flyby
